violations.description: CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored not covered (pizzas) in reach in cooler in the back area
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employee noted preparing food with contaminating hands after handling cell phone and not washing hands.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen.

PREMISES (1 pts): Lockers or other suitable storage facilities noted not provided or being used for the storage of personal belongings. Do not have personal items such as cell phones vapes clothes in and/or on food contact surfaces. Should be stored in pockets or lockers.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler/freezer interiors and exteriors reachin cooler/freezer door gaskets portable fan guards and other equipment exteriors noted not clean.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): A personal beverage was observed in an improper container. Cups noted with no lids.
